series_metadata.series_title: National Association of Long-Term Care Associations Board (NAB) Exam Reports
series_metadata.series_description: The Board has score reports from all individuals who took the NAB exam on file in paper format.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Purge all historical score reports from NAB in paper form, as each individual LNHA has his/her own score report in his/her file. Historical paper score reports will be shredded immediately. ; Electronic: Licensed Nursing Home Administrators (NAB) historical exam reports will be shredded immediately, as a copy is in the administrator’s file and stored electronically with the testing service., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
